title: cynometra ramiflora var. bijuga
intro: Cynometra ramiflora var. bijuga, also known as the bijuga or bilva tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. The leaves and bark of the Cynometra ramiflora var. bijuga plant are used in traditional medicine, and it is believed to have medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is also said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the Cynometra ramiflora var. bijuga plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
